claim: Explorer evidence is verified: all facts have project-scoped sources with exact paths, no assumptions presented as facts, and no unresolved missing data. The claim that evidence dispatch implements JSON repair with explicit error blocking and PRD readiness integration is correct.

evidence.summary: parseJsonCandidate implements JSON repair with tracked repaired flag
evidence.why: Verifies explorer fact 1: minor recoverable JSON drift is handled

evidence.summary: Test confirms JSON repair records json_repaired flag and passes status
evidence.why: Verifies explorer test evidence: repair behavior is validated

evidence.summary: normalizeAgentResult returns explicit EVIDENCE_AGENT_INVALID_JSON error code
evidence.why: Verifies explorer fact 3: unrecoverable JSON fails closed

evidence.summary: Test asserts status blocked and error_code EVIDENCE_AGENT_INVALID_JSON
evidence.why: Verifies explorer test evidence: blocking behavior validated

evidence.summary: Agent errors feed into inspectDemandPrdReadiness and set prd_ready false
evidence.why: Verifies explorer fact 5: PRD readiness integration exists

evidence.summary: Test verifies agent conflicts cause prd_ready false and blocker code
evidence.why: Verifies explorer test evidence: readiness propagation validated

risks: JSON repair patterns in parseJsonCandidate may not cover all real-world Claude drift variations
Test coverage may not reflect actual agent output patterns in production

result.notes: All 10 explorer evidence records verified against actual code and tests. No assumptions promoted to facts. All evidence paths exist and are usable. PRD readiness criteria met: project has JSON repair implementation, explicit error blocking, integration tests, and readiness gate. Cross_check not required.
